title: astragalus nigrescens
intro: Astragalus nigrescens, also known as Huangqi or Chinese milk vetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It is native to China and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus nigrescens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus nigrescens can be prepared into various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a decoction.
